result.markdown:
---
title: "R build-in shapes for ggplot2"
date: 2023-05-28
# date-modified: 2023-04-05
categories:
  - ggplot2
  - shapes
image: shape.png
---



::: {.cell layout-align="center"}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(
    tidyverse
)
theme_set(theme_bw(16))

### create the coordinate
n_g <- 4
pch_df <- data.frame(p = c(0:25)) %>%
    mutate(x = rep(seq_len(ceiling(n() / n_g)),
        each = n_g,
        length.out = n()
    )) %>%
    group_by(x) %>%
    mutate(y = 1:n())
head(pch_df)
## # A tibble: 6 × 3
## # Groups:   x [2]
##       p     x     y
##   <int> <int> <int>
## 1     0     1     1
## 2     1     1     2
## 3     2     1     3
## 4     3     1     4
## 5     4     2     1
## 6     5     2     2

### plot shapes
pch_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, shape = p), ) +
    scale_shape_identity() +
    geom_point(size = 5, fill = "steelblue") +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    geom_text(aes(
        x = x - 0.5, y = y,
        label = paste0("pch =", p)
    ), size = 3) +
    labs(
        title = "pch in R"
    ) +
    theme(
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        plot.caption = element_text(
            size = 16,
            color = "steelblue",
            face = "bold"
        )
    )
```
